title: aster erectus
intro: Aster erectus, also known as New England Aster, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its tall stature and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Aster erectus include its potential to improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Aster erectus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in herbal infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
